message:
feat(html): Add encryption module and register html_export in lib.rs

- Add encryption.rs with Web Crypto API compatible encryption stubs
  (AES-GCM with PBKDF2 key derivation, placeholder until feature enabled)
- Fix mod.rs exports (EncryptedContent, EncryptionParams, not EncryptionKey)
- Register html_export module in src/lib.rs
- All 31 html_export tests pass

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
